testcase.name: createTestApp > starts optional services, applies SQL steps, exposes tx/admin helpers, and tears down
createTestApp > uses default LocalStack services and omits Cognito when disabled
createTestApp > applies seed-only SQL setup without requiring migrations
createTestApp > stops started containers when app initialization fails
createTestApp > preserves the initialization error when cleanup also fails
runDoctorForApp > returns exit code and captured output from the doctor process
runDoctorForApp > defaults a null close code to failure
runDoctorForApp > rejects when process spawning fails
createStynxFixtures unit defaults > generates tenant and user defaults when optional fields are omitted
createStynxFixtures unit defaults > generates document defaults and preserves explicit optional fields
LGPD fixture helpers > emits a PII map with every fixture strategy
LGPD fixture helpers > seeds generated ids and preserves caller-provided ids
LGPD fixture helpers > generates tenant and actor ids when no input is provided
expectROCannotWrite > resolves when fn throws ReadOnlyViolationError
expectROCannotWrite > rethrows non-RO errors
expectROCannotWrite > throws when fn resolves without error
archive-aware matchers > accepts archive and live row counts for moved and restored rows
archive-aware matchers > reports rows missing from archive or still present in live tables
archive-aware matchers > uses public schema metadata for tables without an explicit schema
archive-aware matchers > checks archive mirror existence and column parity
archive-aware matchers > reports missing archive mirrors and mirror drift
auditExpect > finds an audit row whose tags match every requested tag
auditExpect > uses schema, row id, and tags defaults when only entity and operation are provided
auditExpect > reports when no audit row matches the requested tags
expectRLSIsolated > allows rows for the queried tenant and ignores tenant_id snake-case shape
expectRLSIsolated > reports leaked rows from another tenant
expectRestoreConflict > resolves when fn throws RestoreConflictError
expectRestoreConflict > rethrows non-conflict errors
expectRestoreConflict > throws when fn resolves without error
expectSoftDeleteBlocked > resolves when fn throws SoftDeleteBlockedError
expectSoftDeleteBlocked > rethrows non-blocked errors
expectSoftDeleteBlocked > throws when fn resolves without error
mintTestSession > rejects use outside NODE_ENV=test
mintTestSession > mints with an audience and omits permsHash when permissions are empty
@stynx/testing > creates an isolated app, seeds fixtures, and exercises archive-aware matchers

failure.message: Test timed out in 30000ms. If this is a long-running test, pass a timeout value as the last argument or configure it globally with "testTimeout".

testcase.failure: Error: Test timed out in 30000ms. If this is a long-running test, pass a timeout value as the last argument or configure it globally with "testTimeout". ❯ test/testing.spec.ts:69:3

testcase.name: @stynx/testing > exercises restore-conflict and soft-delete-blocked matchers against custom fixture tables

failure.message: Test timed out in 30000ms. If this is a long-running test, pass a timeout value as the last argument or configure it globally with "testTimeout".

testcase.failure: Error: Test timed out in 30000ms. If this is a long-running test, pass a timeout value as the last argument or configure it globally with "testTimeout". ❯ test/testing.spec.ts:136:3

testcase.name: @stynx/testing > mints a test session only in NODE_ENV=test and runs doctor helper
@stynx/testing > reads context helpers through the shared request context
